column4: Enable "Set Audit Fields upon Record Creation"
column5: Required for LogX's QueueableDeleteLogsTest to compile. The test backdates Log__c.CreatedDate to verify expired logs are purged by QueueableDeleteLogs. Without this org-level setting, CreatedDate is read-only and the class fails to compile, blocking the entire LogX deploy.
column10: Setup → User Interface → User Interface → checked "Set Audit Fields upon Record Creation and Update Records with Inactive Owners" → Saved.

column4: Grant FLS on new Actual_Revenue__c / Inbound_Staging__c / Preempt_Transition_Log__c fields
column5: Slice 3-008 added Is_Preempt__c / Preempt_Status__c / Source_Order_Number__c / Calendar_Type__c on Actual_Revenue__c, the same three on Inbound_Staging__c, and the full Preempt_Transition_Log__c object. Apex runs in system mode but UI access (worklists, reports, Setup audits) requires field-level security on the appropriate permission sets — at minimum the Sales Ops / Reconciliation perm sets that already grant the parent objects.
column10: Setup → Permission Sets → for each permset that grants Actual_Revenue__c/Inbound_Staging__c access: Object Settings → enable Read/Edit on the new fields. Add full CRUD on Preempt_Transition_Log__c to the Sales Ops Console / Reconciliation Operator permsets.

column4: Grant FLS on Projection__c.Forecast_Stage__c and CRUD on Forecast_Stage_Snapshot__c
column5: Slice 3-009 added Forecast_Stage__c (Stage 0–5/Booked/NA) on Projection__c and a child Forecast_Stage_Snapshot__c object with weekly snapshots. AEs need Read/Edit on Forecast_Stage__c via the AE perm set; Sales Ops + Finance need Read on Forecast_Stage_Snapshot__c for forecast accuracy reporting.
column10: Setup → Permission Sets → AE / Sales Manager perm sets: enable Read/Edit on Projection__c.Forecast_Stage__c. Sales Ops Console / Finance perm sets: enable Read on Forecast_Stage_Snapshot__c (auto-cascades from master).

column4: Assign System_Budget_Lock_Bypass custom permission to Finance/Sales-Ops admin perm set
column5: 3-009 blocks illegal Forecast_Stage__c regression (e.g., Stage 3 → Stage 1) at the trigger handler. Holders of System_Budget_Lock_Bypass can override for corrections. Reserve to a Finance/Sales-Ops admin perm set — should NOT be on the AE perm set.
column10: Setup → Permission Sets → Finance Admin (or equivalent) → Custom Permissions → enable System_Budget_Lock_Bypass. Confirm AE perm set does NOT grant it.

column4: Schedule the weekly Forecast Stage Snapshot job
column5: 3-009 deploys the ForecastStageSnapshotScheduler class but the cron job itself is not registered automatically. Run System.schedule via anonymous Apex once — Sundays 23:59 in org TZ (America/New_York for this org).
column10: Developer Console → Open Execute Anonymous → run: ForecastStageSnapshotScheduler.schedule();  — verifies via ForecastStageSnapshotScheduler.isScheduled() and getNextFireTime().

column4: Bulk-update existing Opportunities to new StageName values
column5: Slice I deactivates 6 legacy stages (Working/Pitched/Committed/Booked/Draft/Prospecting). Any open Opps still on those stages must be migrated first. univision-production DE org has no real data; required only when promoting to sandboxes/prod. Mapping: Draft/Prospecting → Stage 1 - Lead; Working → Stage 3 - Pipeline/Deal; Pitched → Stage 4 - Negotiation; Committed/Booked → Stage 5 - Contract Pending.
column10: Data Loader: SELECT Id, StageName FROM Opportunity WHERE StageName IN ('Working','Pitched','Committed','Booked','Draft','Prospecting'); update with new value per mapping above; verify no rows remain.

column4: Bulk-update existing Opportunities off the 3 retired RecordTypes
column5: Slice I deactivates Agency_Buy/Direct_Buy/Local_Ad_Sales RTs. Any Opp still using them needs RT reassignment to one of the 7 channel RTs (TV_Linear/Digital/Radio_Linear/TV_Affiliates/Radio_Network/TV_Border_Stations/Radio_Digital). univision-production DE has no data.
column10: Default rule: Agency_Buy/Direct_Buy → TV_Linear (most common channel); Local_Ad_Sales → TV_Linear. Confirm with stakeholders before bulk update for prod.

column5: The Pipeline_Kanban list view auto-renders as a Kanban board but stage colors must be set in Setup UI. Recommend: Stage 1 - Lead = gray, Stage 2 - Discovery/CNA = light blue, Stage 3 - Pipeline/Deal = blue, Stage 4 - Negotiation = orange, Stage 5 - Contract Pending = green, Closed Won = dark green, Closed Lost = red.
column10: Open Opportunity tab → Pipeline Kanban list view → click 'Display As: Kanban' → click ⚙ → set colors per stage. Save.

column4: Resolve TV Border Stations + Radio - Digital source-system mapping
column5: 2 of the 7 channel RTs have unknown source-system filters. Reconciliation engine cannot route inbound actuals to them until resolved. Open questions logged in memory file project_open_questions.md.
column10: Confirm with stakeholders: which property/file isolates TV Border Stations (likely WO_TV filtered to border-region call letters); is Radio - Digital streaming audio via Operative or a separate stream. Update reconciliation rules + RT descriptions once resolved.

column4: Add Last_Year_Amount__c data path for Sales Outlook LY$ column
column5: Sales Outlook dashboard ships without LY$ and % Change columns because Actual_Revenue__c has no Opportunity__c lookup. Resolution options: (a) add Opportunity__c lookup on Actual_Revenue__c + repoint reconciliation engine, (b) add a manual Last_Year_Amount__c currency field on Opportunity that Finance enters once per year. Pick one before next forecast cycle.
column10: Recommend option (a) for accuracy; defer to data-model slice. Reports/MediaCloud/Sales_Outlook_Matrix can be extended once chosen.
